commands.name: ban
commands.description: Ban a user from the server permanently or temporarily.
commands.longDescription: Bans the specified user from the server. Optionally set a duration for temporary bans. Requires Ban Members permission. Logs to mod-log channel if configured.

commands.name: unban
commands.description: Unban a previously banned user by their ID.
commands.longDescription: Removes the ban for a user using their Discord ID. The user must be currently banned for this to work.

options.name: user_id
options.description: Discord ID of the banned user

commands.name: kick
commands.description: Kick a user from the server. They can rejoin with an invite.
commands.longDescription: Removes the specified user from the server. Unlike a ban, the user can rejoin using an invite link.

commands.name: timeout
commands.description: Temporarily timeout a user, preventing them from sending messages.
commands.longDescription: Puts a user in Discord's native timeout state for a specified duration. They cannot send messages, join voice channels, or add reactions during the timeout.

commands.name: warn
commands.description: Issue a formal warning to a user. Warnings stack and trigger auto-punishments.
commands.longDescription: Issues a warning to the user and saves it to their profile. At 3 warnings, the user is auto-muted. At 5 warnings, auto-banned. DMs the user with the warning reason.

commands.name: warnings
commands.description: View all warnings for a user.
commands.longDescription: Displays a full list of all warnings issued to the specified user, including dates, reasons, and the moderator who issued each warning.

commands.name: clearwarn
commands.description: Clear all or specific warnings for a user.
commands.longDescription: Removes warnings from a user's record. Specify a warning ID to remove a single warning, or use 'all' to clear their entire warning history.

commands.name: purge
commands.description: Bulk delete messages from a channel. Up to 100 at a time.
commands.longDescription: Deletes a specified number of recent messages from the current channel. Can filter by user to only delete messages from a specific person. Messages older than 14 days cannot be bulk-deleted.

options.name: user
options.description: Only delete messages from this user

commands.name: lock
commands.description: Lock a channel so only mods can send messages.
commands.longDescription: Removes the Send Messages permission from @everyone in the specified channel, effectively locking it. Mods with explicit permissions can still message.

commands.name: unlock
commands.description: Unlock a previously locked channel.
commands.longDescription: Restores the Send Messages permission for @everyone in the specified channel, allowing members to send messages again.

commands.name: slowmode
commands.description: Set slowmode delay for a channel (0 to disable).
commands.longDescription: Sets a slowmode cooldown on the specified channel. Users must wait the specified time between messages. Set to 0 to disable slowmode.

commands.name: role
commands.description: Add or remove a role from a user.
commands.longDescription: Adds or removes a specified role from a user. The bot's role must be higher than the role being assigned/removed in the role hierarchy.

options.name: action
options.description: add or remove (toggles if not specified)

commands.name: nickname
commands.description: Change or reset a user's server nickname.
commands.longDescription: Changes the server nickname of the specified user. Leave the nickname blank to reset it to their username.

commands.name: modlog
commands.description: View recent moderation actions taken in the server.
commands.longDescription: Shows a paginated list of the most recent moderation actions (bans, kicks, warns, timeouts) with full details including moderator, target, reason, and timestamp.

commands.name: balance
commands.description: Check your wallet and bank balance, or view another user's.
commands.longDescription: Displays a full balance card showing wallet balance, bank balance, total net worth, and server rank. Optionally view another user's public balance.

commands.name: daily
commands.description: Claim your free daily coins. Builds a streak for bonus multipliers.
commands.longDescription: Claim between 100–500 coins every 24 hours. Build a streak for multiplier bonuses — Day 7 gives 2x reward, Day 30 gives a legendary bonus chest.

commands.name: work
commands.description: Do a virtual job to earn coins. Safe with no risk of loss.
commands.longDescription: Perform a randomly selected virtual job for guaranteed coin earnings. No risk of loss — great for consistent grinding. Has a 1-hour cooldown.

commands.name: crime
commands.description: Attempt a risky crime for big coins. Fail and pay a fine.
commands.longDescription: High-risk, high-reward earn method. ~60% success rate. On success earn 200–800 coins. On failure, lose a fine from your wallet. 2-hour cooldown.

commands.name: fish
commands.description: Go fishing to catch fish worth varying amounts of coins.
commands.longDescription: Cast your rod and catch a random fish. Common fish are worth 20–100 coins. Rare fish like Golden Carp or Blue Whale can be worth thousands. 30-minute cooldown.

commands.name: beg
commands.description: Beg for coins. Low reward but zero risk. Very desi.
commands.longDescription: Beg for a small amount of coins from the universe. Sometimes generous, sometimes not. Earn 1–50 coins with a 30-minute cooldown.

commands.name: deposit
commands.description: Deposit coins from your wallet into the bank for safekeeping.
commands.longDescription: Transfers coins from your wallet to your bank. Banked coins are safe from /rob attempts. Use 'all' to deposit your entire wallet balance.

commands.name: withdraw
commands.description: Withdraw coins from your bank back to your wallet.
commands.longDescription: Transfers coins from your bank to your wallet. Withdrawn coins can be used in shop, gambling, and transfers. Use 'all' to withdraw everything.

commands.name: transfer
commands.description: Send coins to another user from your wallet.
commands.longDescription: Transfers the specified amount of coins from your wallet to another user's wallet. Cannot transfer from bank. Minimum transfer amount is 1 coin.

commands.name: rob
commands.description: Attempt to rob coins from another user's wallet.
commands.longDescription: Try to steal coins from another user's wallet. Success earns you a portion of their wallet. Fail and you pay a fine. Target must have at least 200 coins in wallet. Robber Shield item protects from being robbed.

commands.name: shop
commands.description: Browse the item shop — roles, badges, boosts, and power-ups.
commands.longDescription: Opens a paginated shop display showing all available items, their prices, effects, and stock. Items include roles, cosmetic badges, economy boosts, and special power-ups.

commands.name: buy
commands.description: Purchase an item from the shop using your wallet coins.
commands.longDescription: Buys the specified item from the shop. Deducts the price from your wallet and adds the item to your inventory. Some items activate automatically on purchase.

commands.name: inventory
commands.description: View all items currently in your inventory.
commands.longDescription: Shows all items you own, including active boosts with their remaining duration, collectible roles, badges, and any special items.

commands.name: leaderboard
commands.description: View the richest users in the server or globally.
commands.longDescription: Displays a top-10 leaderboard sorted by total net worth (wallet + bank + item values). Use the 'global' option to see rankings across all servers.

commands.name: slots
commands.description: Spin the slot machine. Match symbols to win big.
commands.longDescription: Bet coins on the slot machine. Match 3 symbols to win. Three 7s = 10x your bet. Three same fruits = 3x. Two same = 1.5x. Anything else loses.

commands.name: coinflip
commands.description: Flip a coin. Bet on heads or tails. Win = double your bet.
commands.longDescription: 50/50 gambling command. Bet any amount and choose heads or tails. Win and you double your bet. Lose and you lose it all. Pure luck.

commands.name: wordle
commands.description: Play the classic 5-letter word guessing game.
commands.longDescription: Guess a 5-letter word in 6 tries. Green = correct letter & position. Yellow = correct letter wrong position. Grey = letter not in word. Daily challenge mode available.

commands.name: trivia
commands.description: Answer trivia questions from 20+ categories.
commands.longDescription: Get a random trivia question from 10,000+ question database across 20+ categories. Includes a Pakistan-specific category. Choose difficulty: easy, medium, or hard.

commands.name: blackjack
commands.description: Play Blackjack against the bot. Get closer to 21 to win.
commands.longDescription: Full casino-style Blackjack. Bet coins, receive cards, and try to beat the dealer without going over 21. Supports hit, stand, and double down actions via buttons.

commands.name: hangman
commands.description: Play hangman. Guess the hidden word one letter at a time.
commands.longDescription: Classic hangman game with multiple word categories. Guess letters to reveal the hidden word. You have 7 wrong guesses before it's game over. Win and earn coins.

commands.name: tictactoe
commands.description: Challenge a user to Tic-Tac-Toe. Classic 3x3 grid.
commands.longDescription: Challenge any server member to a game of Tic-Tac-Toe. Game is played via Discord button interactions on a 3x3 grid embed.

commands.name: chess
commands.description: Challenge a user to a game of chess with ELO tracking.
commands.longDescription: Full chess engine with PGN-based board rendering, legal move validation, ELO rating system, and challenge/accept system for server members.

commands.name: connectfour
commands.description: Play Connect Four against a server member.
commands.longDescription: Classic Connect Four drop-disc game rendered in Discord embeds. Take turns dropping coloured discs to connect 4 in a row horizontally, vertically, or diagonally.

commands.name: snake
commands.description: Play Snake game in Discord using reaction buttons.
commands.longDescription: Classic Snake game rendered in a Discord embed grid. Control the snake with reaction arrows to eat food and grow. Game ends when you hit a wall or yourself.

commands.name: rps
commands.description: Play Rock Paper Scissors against the bot or a user.
commands.longDescription: Classic Rock Paper Scissors. Play against the bot for fun, or challenge a server member. First to 3 wins wins the match. Optional coin bet.

commands.name: guess
commands.description: Guess the number the bot is thinking of (1–100).
commands.longDescription: The bot picks a random number between 1 and 100. You have 7 attempts to guess it. After each guess, the bot says higher or lower. Correct guess earns coins.

commands.name: meme
commands.description: Get a random hot meme from Reddit.
commands.longDescription: Fetches a random fresh meme from top Pakistani and international meme subreddits including r/memes, r/dankmemes, and r/PakistanMemes. New memes every call.

commands.name: roast
commands.description: Roast a user with a savage burn. Targets @mention.
commands.longDescription: Delivers a savage roast line targeted at the mentioned user. Choose intensity level: mild, medium, or savage. The bot will never hold back.

commands.name: joke
commands.description: Get a random joke. Dad jokes, dark humor, puns & more.
commands.longDescription: Fetches a random joke from a massive database. Categories include: general, programming, dark, pun, dad, and spooky. Guaranteed to either make you laugh or groan.

commands.name: 8ball
commands.description: Ask the Magic 8-Ball any yes/no question.
commands.longDescription: The mystical Magic 8-Ball answers your yes/no questions with 20 unique responses — 10 positive, 5 neutral, and 5 negative. The universe has spoken.
examples: /8ball Am I going to get rich?

commands.name: desiroast
commands.description: Roast someone with Pakistani desi style burns in Roman Urdu.
commands.longDescription: Delivers a savage Pakistani desi roast in Roman Urdu. Extra spicy, guaranteed to offend. For entertainment purposes only — handle with care.

commands.name: desijoke
commands.description: Get a Pakistani desi joke in Roman Urdu.
commands.longDescription: Delivers a random Pakistani joke — latifas, puns, and classic desi humor in Roman Urdu. Fresh jokes pulled from a database of 500+ desi latifas.

commands.name: shayari
commands.description: Get beautiful Urdu shayari for any mood.
commands.longDescription: Fetches a random piece of beautiful Urdu poetry (shayari). Mood options include love, sad, motivational, funny, and philosophical. Poetry from classic Pakistani poets.

commands.name: quote
commands.description: Inspirational quotes from famous Pakistani leaders and poets.
commands.longDescription: Fetches an inspirational quote from famous Pakistani and Muslim historical figures — Allama Iqbal, Quaid-e-Azam, Imran Khan, Benazir Bhutto, and more.

options.name: person
options.description: Person name to get quotes from

commands.name: rishta
commands.description: Generate a hilarious fake rishta bio for a user.
commands.longDescription: Generates a satirical desi marriage proposal bio for the targeted user. Includes made-up height, profession, family background, and demands. Pure Pakistani culture.

commands.name: aesthetic
commands.description: Convert text to ａｅｓｔｈｅｔｉｃ fullwidth characters.
commands.longDescription: Transforms your text into fullwidth aesthetic Japanese-style characters for that vaporwave look. Works with letters, numbers, and spaces.

commands.name: spongebob
commands.description: tYpE YoUr TeXt LiKe MoCkInG SpOnGeBoB.
commands.longDescription: Transforms your text into the iconic mocking SpongeBob alternating case format. Perfect for sarcasm, arguments, and being insufferable online.

commands.name: reverse
commands.description: Reverse any text backwards.
commands.longDescription: Takes your input text and returns it completely reversed — letter by letter. Great for secret messages or confusing your friends.

commands.name: fortune
commands.description: Crack open a fortune cookie for your daily prophecy.
commands.longDescription: Opens a virtual fortune cookie and delivers a random fortune message. Wisdom, humor, or cryptic prophecies — the universe decides.

commands.name: hug
commands.description: Send a warm virtual hug to someone with a GIF.
commands.longDescription: Sends a wholesome hug GIF to the mentioned user. Comes with a heartwarming message. Great for when someone needs some love.

commands.name: slap
commands.description: Slap a user with a satisfying anime GIF.
commands.longDescription: Delivers a virtual slap to the targeted user with a random anime slap GIF. Comes with a dramatic message. For when words just aren't enough.

commands.name: kiss
commands.description: Send a virtual kiss with a cute anime GIF.
commands.longDescription: Sends a virtual kiss to the mentioned user paired with a cute anime kiss GIF. Sweet and wholesome. Use responsibly.

commands.name: pat
commands.description: Give someone a gentle head pat with an adorable GIF.
commands.longDescription: Pats the mentioned user on the head with an adorable anime pat GIF. Perfect for comfort, encouragement, or just being wholesome.

commands.name: poke
commands.description: Poke someone who's gone quiet in the server.
commands.longDescription: Sends a poke GIF to the mentioned user. Nothing says 'hey are you alive?' quite like a good poke. Comes with a playful message.

commands.name: serverinfo
commands.description: Display detailed information about the current server.
commands.longDescription: Shows a full server information embed including member count, online count, channel count, role count, boost level, creation date, verification level, and server icon.

commands.name: userinfo
commands.description: Display detailed information about a user.
commands.longDescription: Shows full user info — account creation date, server join date, roles, nickname, avatar, boost status, and online status. Works for any server member.

options.name: user
options.description: User to get info on (yourself if empty)

commands.name: avatar
commands.description: Display a user's Discord avatar in full resolution.
commands.longDescription: Fetches and displays the mentioned user's Discord avatar in full resolution. Supports static PNG, animated GIF, and server-specific avatars.

commands.name: banner
commands.description: Display a user's Discord profile banner.
commands.longDescription: Fetches and displays the mentioned user's Discord profile banner in full quality. If the user has no banner, displays their accent color instead.

commands.name: poll
commands.description: Create a poll with up to 10 options and a timer.
commands.longDescription: Creates a rich poll embed with up to 10 voting options displayed as buttons. Set an optional auto-close timer. Results are published when the poll ends.

commands.name: remind
commands.description: Set a personal reminder. Bot will DM you when time is up.
commands.longDescription: Sets a reminder that the bot will DM you about after the specified duration. Supports natural language time parsing. Max 1 month in advance.

commands.name: weather
commands.description: Get real-time weather for any city worldwide.
commands.longDescription: Fetches current weather data from OpenWeather API. Shows temperature, humidity, wind speed, UV index, feels-like temperature, and a 3-day forecast.

commands.name: translate
commands.description: Translate text to any of 100+ languages including Urdu.
commands.longDescription: Translates text using LibreTranslate API. Supports 100+ languages including Urdu, Punjabi, Sindhi, Arabic, and all major global languages. Auto-detects source language.

commands.name: calc
commands.description: Calculate any math expression including advanced functions.
commands.longDescription: Full math calculator supporting basic operators, brackets, powers, square roots, trigonometry, logarithms, and more. Never be wrong again.

commands.name: currency
commands.description: Convert between currencies with live exchange rates.
commands.longDescription: Converts any amount between world currencies using live exchange rates. Includes PKR, USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, and 150+ more currencies.

commands.name: prayer
commands.description: Get accurate prayer times for any Pakistani city.
commands.longDescription: Fetches accurate Islamic prayer times from Aladhan API for any city in Pakistan or worldwide. Shows Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha, and Sunrise times with Hijri date.

commands.name: wiki
commands.description: Search Wikipedia and get a summary of any topic.
commands.longDescription: Searches Wikipedia and returns a clean summary of the first matching article. Includes title, extract, page image (if available), and a link to the full article.

commands.name: ping
commands.description: Check the bot's current latency and API response time.
commands.longDescription: Shows the bot's WebSocket heartbeat latency and REST API round-trip time. Useful for checking bot performance and connectivity.

commands.name: uptime
commands.description: Check how long the bot has been running without a restart.
commands.longDescription: Displays the bot's current uptime since last restart, including days, hours, minutes, and seconds. Also shows memory usage and server count.

commands.name: botinfo
commands.description: View full information about PakPhantom bot.
commands.longDescription: Displays full bot stats — version, developer, uptime, server count, user count, command count, library version, and invite link.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Get help with commands. Browse categories or search.
commands.longDescription: Displays all available commands organized by category. Search for a specific command to get detailed usage info. Use the category buttons to navigate.

commands.name: rank
commands.description: View your current XP rank card with level and progress.
commands.longDescription: Displays a beautiful rank card showing your current level, XP progress bar, server rank position, total messages sent, and current level role if any.

commands.name: levels
commands.description: View the server XP leaderboard — top 10 ranked users.
commands.longDescription: Displays the top 10 members in the server sorted by total XP earned. Shows rank, username, level, and XP amount for each entry.

commands.name: setxp
commands.description: Admin: Set a user's XP to a specific amount.
commands.longDescription: Manually set the XP amount for a specific user. Admin-only command. Useful for correcting XP or granting bonus XP as rewards.

commands.name: addxp
commands.description: Admin: Add XP to a user's total.
commands.longDescription: Adds a specified amount of XP to a user's current total. Admin-only command. Can be used to reward active members.

commands.name: levelroles
commands.description: View the level-up role reward configuration.
commands.longDescription: Displays all configured level-up role rewards — which roles are granted at which level milestones. Admins can configure these via /setup.

commands.name: resetxp
commands.description: Admin: Reset a user's XP to zero.
commands.longDescription: Resets a user's XP and level back to zero. Admin-only. Irreversible unless you use /addxp afterwards.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Run the interactive bot setup wizard for your server.
commands.longDescription: Launches an interactive setup wizard that walks through configuring: mod-log channel, welcome channel, XP settings, economy settings, auto-mod, and more.

commands.name: config
commands.description: View or change the bot's configuration for this server.
commands.longDescription: View all current bot settings for the server, or update specific settings like prefix, mod-log channel, welcome message, XP rate, and more.

commands.name: autorole
commands.description: Set a role to automatically assign to new members.
commands.longDescription: Configures an auto-role that is automatically assigned to every new member who joins the server. Set to 'none' to disable auto-role.

commands.name: welcome
commands.description: Configure the welcome message and channel for new members.
commands.longDescription: Sets up a custom welcome message for new members. Configure the channel, message content (with variable placeholders), and embed style. Also supports goodbye messages.
